messages.content: How does the assistant avoid hallucinations?

The application should store previous user and assistant turns so that later questions can reference earlier points. This is especially useful for prompts such as "Summarize the second recommendation again" because the standalone meaning depends on the chat history. If the support lead asks how the system avoids hallucinations, explain that the answer prompt explicitly tells the model to use only retrieved context and to reply with "I don't know." when the answer is missing from the documents. [support-runbook.txt]
Explain more about the previous point

Employee Handbook Excerpt

The company operates a document support assistant for internal knowledge lookup. Team members should ask factual questions in clear language and expect the assistant to cite the source document when possible. If the assistant cannot find sufficient evidence in the indexed documents, it must say that it does not know instead of inventing an answer. [employee-handbook.txt]
